sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103834" key="thlo/meli" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τηλόμελι</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέλιτος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n103834.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixture of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῆλις</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">and honey</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
